data.body:
There are no forest left in the Northern Hemisphere. Less than 3% is primary forest. There is only forestry left aka wood agriculture. 

We can't relate to how slow trees evolve. Trees need stable climates and time and will therefore go extinct soon. Ghosts in a shell.
